subject: Urgent: Your account has been suspended - verify now
body: Dear customer, We detected unusual activity. Your account suspended until you verify your identity. Please confirm your password immediately or your account will expire within 24 hours. https://www.paypal.com/login Failure to act now will result in permanent closure. PayPal Security Team
score_reasons: Display name impersonates 'paypal' but domain is 'paypa1-support.com'.
Urgency / pressure language: account suspended, act now, expire.
Requests credentials / sensitive data: confirm your password, verify your identity.
Link points directly to a raw IP address.
Link text shows 'www.paypal.com' but actually points to '198.51.100.23'.
Copy uses templated phrasing typical of AI-generated / mass phishing.

subject: Congratulations! You have won a $500 gift card
body: You have won a $500 Amazon gift card! Claim your free prize now before it expires. Click here: http://bit.ly/claim-prize-now and provide your credit card to cover shipping.
score_reasons: Display name impersonates 'amazon' but domain is 'amaz0n-giftcards.net'.
Urgency / pressure language: expire.
Requests credentials / sensitive data: credit card.
Financial lure / bait: claim your, gift card, prize.
Uses URL shortener(s): bit.ly.

subject: Action required: Update your password today
body: Our records show your mailbox is full. To avoid losing emails you must update your password immediately. Log in to http://company-secure-verify.com/reset and confirm your identity. This is a final notice.
score_reasons: Sender domain looks auto-generated / suspicious.
Urgency / pressure language: action required, final notice, immediately.
Requests credentials / sensitive data: confirm your identity, log in to, update your password.

subject: Unusual sign-in activity detected
body: We detected a sign-in from a new device. If this wasn't you, verify your account immediately by opening the attached invoice.html file and signing in to restore access.
score_reasons: Display name impersonates 'microsoft' but domain is 'micros0ft-alerts.com'.
Urgency / pressure language: immediately.
Requests credentials / sensitive data: verify your account.
References risky attachment type(s): .htm, .html.
Copy uses templated phrasing typical of AI-generated / mass phishing.

subject: Your payment is overdue - update billing
body: Your membership is on hold because your payment is overdue. Update your billing details now to avoid cancellation. Visit tinyurl.com/netflix-billing and enter your card number to continue watching.
score_reasons: Display name impersonates 'netflix' but domain is 'netfl1x-billing.info'.
Requests credentials / sensitive data: card number.
Uses URL shortener(s): tinyurl.com.

subject: Your Monday tech digest is here
body:
Hi Riley,

Here are this week's top engineering reads, including a deep dive on Postgres indexing and a guide to FastAPI dependency injection. Read online at https://techweekly.com/digest .

Happy reading!
score_reasons: No phishing indicators detected by rule engine.

subject: Reminder: Submit your timesheet by Friday
body:
Hi Jane,

This is a friendly reminder to submit your timesheet in the HR portal by end of day Friday. Let me know if you have any questions.

Thanks,
HR Team
score_reasons: No phishing indicators detected by rule engine.

subject: Meeting invite: Sprint planning Thursday 10am
body: You're invited to Sprint Planning on Thursday at 10:00am in Room 4. Agenda and notes are in the shared drive. See you there!
score_reasons: No phishing indicators detected by rule engine.
